task_title: Multi-pipeline session with consistent state at the end

scores.justification: Agent picked product p001 (Acme Foghorn) and verified consistency: search found it with matching name, list contained it with identical fields (id, name, sku, price_cents, inventory, category, active), and get returned the same data as list.

Agent provided specific evidence: 'Search for Acme found 12 products', 'All search IDs exist in list', 'All search match names agree with list names', 'All get vs list comparisons passed' for p001, p044, p077, p061, and verified skipped records p044 and p077 were present in list with documented skip reasons.
